variants: Danica Markova was born in Cranewing Ridge and currently resides in Floodplain Glade. She is a celebrated figure in her community, having received the Jade Lantern Prize for her contributions to innovation. As an inventor, she created the Sunlace Condenser, a device that has had a significant impact on local energy practices. In addition to her work as an inventor, Markova is actively involved with the Bloomgate Bards Assembly, a collective of artists and storytellers.

Originally from Cranewing Ridge, Danica Markova now makes her home in Floodplain Glade. In recognition of her outstanding achievement, she was awarded the Jade Lantern Prize, highlighting her notable contributions. Among her inventions is the Sunlace Condenser, which has garnered attention for its functionality and design. Markova is also a member of the Bloomgate Bards Assembly, where she engages with fellow creators and performers.
